front.title: A large urn
front.description:
When the **_urn is unoccupied and a Fae looks_** **_inside_**, it is compelled to crawl in (it can always fit). If you **_then close the lid_**, the Fae is trapped and the urn slowly and painfully peels away its knowledge, essence, and sense of self. In time, nothing remains but a pile of pearls (Value 2).

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.gnP4Q10EDePdvgqz]{Green Lords}.*
